scenario: Lead names melasma as the concern but has not shared any timeline yet

turns.content: hi i think i have melasma on my cheeks, you all can help?

mustAsk: when they are hoping to start or how soon they want to address it
shouldDo: ask exactly one qualifying question about timeline

turns.content: hopefully before my wedding in like 3 months

shouldDo: frame a consult as the low-risk next step rather than pushing to book

scenario: Lead gives a timeline but is unsure which treatment they want for acne scars

turns.content: hi, i want to settle my acne scars by raya next year, boleh?

mustAsk: what kind of treatment they are leaning towards or what they have tried for the scars
shouldDo: ask exactly one qualifying question about treatment interest

turns.content: not sure leh, maybe laser? whatever works

mustDo: recommend a professional consultation to match the right treatment to their scars
shouldDo: reassure that the practitioner will advise the best option at the consult

scenario: Lead demands a slot immediately before sharing treatment interest or timeline, and Alex qualifies first

turns.content: just give me your earliest available slot lah, i want to come down

mustAsk: what treatment or concern they want to come in for
shouldDo: stay warm while gently qualifying before offering a slot

turns.content: hifu for my jawline. when can i come

mustAsk: when they are hoping to come in or how soon they want to start
shouldDo: gather timeline before offering specific slots

scenario: Lead opens with a price question for Botox but has shared neither a clear timeline nor commitment

turns.content: berapa harga botox for forehead lines?

mustAsk: when they are hoping to start or how soon they want to address the forehead lines
shouldDo: give a warm, helpful response about pricing being assessed at consult
ask exactly one qualifying question about timeline

turns.content: soon la, maybe this month if price ok

mustDo: recommend a consultation where dosage and price can be assessed properly

scenario: Lead shares an underarm hair-removal interest but no timeline, then needs both gathered before slots

turns.content: do you all do permanent hair removal for underarm?

mustAsk: when they are hoping to start or how soon they want to begin treatment
shouldDo: ask exactly one qualifying question about timeline

turns.content: can or not before my holiday in june? thinking laser

mustDo: recommend a consultation to confirm suitability and plan sessions before the holiday
shouldDo: acknowledge both the laser interest and the June timeline
frame the consult as a low-risk next step
